findings.title: Missing/Incomplete Nav2 Parameters File
findings.issue: Parameter file contains only 12 lines (wheel_radius, encoder_resolution, odometry state). Missing all mandatory server configs: planner_server, controller_server, smoother_server, amcl, map_server, costmap_common_params, bt_navigator full config.
findings.impact: Nav2 lifecycle manager fails during configure state; plugin loading fails; navigation stack non-functional
findings.fix_snippet: Add complete Nav2 parameter sections. See NAV2_AUDIT.md Finding #1 for full template with planner_server, controller_server, smoother_server, amcl, map_server, costmap layers.
findings.expected_output: RegularPolygonFootprint or GridBased or other valid planner name

findings.title: Incorrect Parameter File Path Reference
findings.issue: References 'robot_localization/config/nav2_params.yaml' which does not exist. Actual file is 'wg_utilities/nav2/nav2_param.yaml'.
findings.impact: Nav2 launch fails; 'params_file' argument resolves to non-existent path; lifecycle manager receives empty/invalid config
findings.test_command: ros2 launch wg_bringup wg.launch.py mode:=sim 2>&1 | grep -i 'file not found'

findings.title: Non-existent Node Executables in full_localization.launch.py
findings.issue: Attempts to launch 'wheel_odom_node', 'imu_odom_node', 'lidar_node' from robot_localization package. These executables do not exist in standard or forked robot_localization.
findings.impact: Launch fails immediately; full_localization never completes; state estimation pipeline broken
findings.fix_snippet:
Either:
(A) Verify fork provides these executables (check setup.py entry_points)
(B) Replace with standard robot_localization executables (ekf_node, ukf_node) and combine all sensors into UKF
findings.expected_output: No matches (if not custom); if custom, should list all three

findings.title: No Map File Provided or Configured
findings.issue: Nav2 AMCL and global localization require a map (pgm + yaml pair). No map is provided in any launch file or config.
findings.impact: AMCL cannot initialize; global localization fails; robot has no reference frame for pose matching
findings.expected_output: Valid map grid with width, height, resolution (or service exists but returns empty until map loaded)

findings.title: Missing Behavior Tree Configuration
findings.issue: bt_navigator section exists but is incomplete. Missing global_frame, robot_base_frame, odom_topic, default_nav_to_pose_bt_xml, plugin_lib_names.
findings.impact: BT navigator fails to load behavior tree; navigation_to_pose action fails; no recovery behaviors available
findings.fix_snippet:
bt_navigator:
  ros__parameters:
    use_sim_time: true
    global_frame: map
    robot_base_frame: base_link
    odom_topic: /odom
    default_nav_to_pose_bt_xml: /opt/ros/jazzy/share/nav2_bt_navigator/behavior_trees/navigate_to_pose_w_replanning_and_recovery.xml
    plugin_lib_names: ['nav2_compute_path_to_pose_action_bt_node', 'nav2_follow_path_action_bt_node', ...]

findings.title: Costmap Configuration Absent
findings.issue: Missing costmap_common_params, local_costmap, global_costmap sections with plugin layers (static_layer, obstacle_layer, inflation_layer).
findings.impact: Planner has no obstacle information; collision detection disabled; planner returns direct paths through walls
findings.fix_snippet:
costmap_common_params:
  ros__parameters:
    plugins: ['static_layer', 'obstacle_layer', 'inflation_layer']
    obstacle_layer:
      plugin: nav2_costmap_2d::ObstacleLayer
      observation_sources: scan
      scan:
        topic: /scan
        data_type: LaserScan
    inflation_layer:
      plugin: nav2_costmap_2d::InflationLayer
      inflation_radius: 0.55

findings.title: Frame Configuration Incomplete / IMU Offset Defaults to Zero
findings.issue: IMU-to-base_link transform defaults to (0,0,0,0,0,0). If IMU is physically offset, this TF is incorrect, causing odometry drift and LiDAR misalignment.
findings.impact: State estimation converges slowly or incorrectly; LiDAR scans misaligned with robot frame; UKF outputs biased
findings.fix_snippet:
Measure IMU offset from base_link (e.g., 0.1m forward, 0.05m left, 0.03m up).
Then: ros2 launch wg_state_est full_localization.launch.py imu_x:=0.1 imu_y:=-0.05 imu_z:=0.03
findings.test_command: ros2 run tf2_ros tf2_echo base_link imu_link
findings.expected_output: Transform showing correct offset (not all zeros)

findings.title: Gazebo Topic Remappings May Not Match Sensor Drivers
findings.issue: Bridge node remaps '/scan_gpu' and '/camera_image' from Gazebo. If actual Gazebo plugins publish '/scan' or different names, remappings fail silently.
findings.impact: Topics empty or mismatched; sensors not fused; LiDAR data not available to Nav2
findings.fix_snippet:
1. Launch wg.launch.py mode:=sim
2. Check: ros2 topic list | grep -E '(scan|camera)'
3. Update remappings to match actual Gazebo topics
4. Verify Gazebo URDF/SDF plugin configurations match remapping names
findings.expected_output: LaserScan message with ranges array (not empty)

findings.title: Build Issue: wg_interface Symlink Collision
findings.issue: wg_interface (ament_cmake) conflicts with overlay when building with symlinks. Error: 'failed to create symbolic link because existing path cannot be removed: Is a directory'
findings.impact: Build fails; workspace cannot be compiled; development blocked
findings.fix_snippet:
colcon clean
colcon build --symlink-install --allow-overriding robot_localization

OR:

rm -rf build install log
colcon build --allow-overriding robot_localization
findings.expected_output: Summary: 9 packages finished [X.XXs] (all green, no failures)

findings.title: UKF Sensor Config References Non-Existent Topics
findings.issue: EKF/UKF parameters reference 'example/odom' and 'example/imu' which don't exist. Should reference actual sensor topics (/wheel_odom, /imu).
findings.impact: UKF receives no measurements; filter drifts without sensor corrections; localization fails
findings.fix_snippet:
Change:
odom0: example/odom → odom0: /wheel_odom
imu0: example/imu → imu0: /imu

Verify actual topic names: ros2 topic list | grep -E '(odom|imu)'
findings.expected_output: nav_msgs/Odometry message with position and orientation

findings.title: No Static Map Provided for Simulation
findings.issue: Simulation mode uses Gazebo but Nav2 AMCL also runs. Without a map, AMCL cannot perform global localization or scan matching against known environment.
findings.impact: Global localization unavailable in sim; robot position estimate drifts; Nav2 goals may fail if outside expected area
findings.fix_snippet:
Option A: Export map from Gazebo SDF world (via manual processing or script)
Option B: Provide pre-built map from surveyed area matching Gazebo world
Option C: Use SLAM to build map during sim init, then save and reload

Store map in: src/wg_utilities/nav2/maps/gazebo_world.yaml + .pgm

findings.title: Lifecycle Manager Not Explicitly Configured
findings.issue: Nav2 lifecycle manager transitions nodes through states. If misconfigured, nodes may not activate (stuck in Inactive).
findings.impact: Servers exist but inactive; navigation actions hang or fail with 'server not ready'
findings.fix_snippet:
Monitor lifecycle states: ros2 lifecycle list
Expected: all nav2 servers (planner_server, controller_server, smoother_server, bt_navigator, etc.) transition to 'active'.

If stuck in Inactive: check /diagnostics_agg or logs for why.
findings.expected_output:
nav2_lifecycle_manager
  planner_server: active
  controller_server: active
  smoother_server: active
  bt_navigator: active
  ... (all should be 'active')

validation_commands.description: Verify all packages build without error
Verify TF hierarchy: map → odom → base_link → {imu_link, lidar_link}
Verify all sensor topics are published
Verify lifecycle manager and all servers are active
Verify AMCL is publishing pose estimates
Verify map is loaded and accessible

validation_commands.command: ros2 action send_goal navigate_to_pose nav2_msgs/action/NavigateToPose 'pose: {header: {frame_id: "map"}, pose: {position: {x: 1.0, y: 1.0, z: 0.0}, orientation: {w: 1.0}}}'
validation_commands.description: Verify planner responds to navigation goal
